secure - playful, soulful, nondual, exuberant and ordinary

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2026-03-11
artifacts.excerpt:
I made my first video essay!! 

Good art provokes you into experiencing the beauty of your own perception

It's about:
- art and attention + presence
- art history as a progression of how our attention has changed (and some details on that history)
- viewing art as a way to inhabit the artist's world and see through their sight to expand and deepen ourselves
- games
- and more!

Timestamps:
00:00 - good art provokes us into the here-now, in an embodied way, to consider the things that matter
01:06 - art history is a study in how our attention has changed over time
01:39 - art as inhabiting the world of the artist from their perspective
02:26 - flattening of the value hierarchy: from Jesus the King to just the color red
03:05 - Medieval art: spiritual hierarchy
03:33 - the Renaissance: the dignity of the human
04:20 - the Baroque: the Catholic Church engineers attention
05:06 - the Dutch
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, things, feel, feels.
